item.title: Version 0.0.8
item.description:
Version 0.0.8

  • test: add SSHPasswordStore and ShellEscape edge case tests
  • New: add SSH password authentication for remote devices

item.title: Version 0.0.7
item.description:
Version 0.0.7

  • Fixed: force checkout in CI appcast step to avoid dirty worktree conflict
  • test: add ShellEscape unit tests
  • Fixed: preserve tilde expansion in ShellEscape.path

item.title: Version 0.0.6
item.description:
Version 0.0.6

  • Fixed: add accessibility labels to key UI elements
  • Fixed: add tooltips to popover buttons and proper picker label
  • Fixed: replace deprecated .foregroundColor with .foregroundStyle
  • Fixed: make Palette and heatmap colors adaptive for dark mode
  • New: add standard Edit menu with Undo/Cut/Copy/Paste/Select All
  • Fixed: replace deprecated activate(ignoringOtherApps:) with activate()
  • New: add command timeout for SSH remote operations
  • Fixed: eliminate SessionContentItem ID collisions
  • Refactor: extract shared toolIcon() to ClauditFormatter
  • Perf: move DateFormatter creation to static properties
  • Refactor: deduplicate SessionReaderView by composing SessionDetailView
  • Fixed: handle millisecond timestamps in expiresAt credential field
  • Fixed: use app version for User-Agent and respect CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR
  • Fixed: read lastFetched under lock in PricingTable.refreshIfNeeded
  • Fixed: use passRetained for DirectoryMonitor FSEvents context
  • Fixed: sanitize shell-interpolated paths to prevent command injection
  • Update documentation links in README.md

item.title: Version 0.0.5
item.description:
Version 0.0.5

  • Fixed: back/forward navigation fully working for all operations
  • Fixed: forward navigation works for all operations
  • Fixed: replace fixed 50ms activation delay with KVO observation
  • Fixed: enforce window size via NSWindowDelegate.windowWillResize
  • Fixed: window size constraints and dashboard focus
  • Fixed: enforce window size constraints and disable fullscreen
  • Refactor: extract makeWindow helper, disable fullscreen on all windows
  • Fixed: tighten dashboard window size constraints
  • Perf: replace 525 per-cell onHover with single onContinuousHover
  • Fixed: restore ScrollView for all-time heatmap with fixed 75-week span
  • Fixed: week heatmap 6h slots, all-time fill width, dashboard max width
  • Fixed: upgrade icon to 512x512 for Retina clarity
  • Fixed: add hero image to docs homepage
  • New: apply brand colors from app icon to docs theme
  • Fixed: add app icon PNG for README, rewrite in pikpaktui style
  • New: docs site, release script, README, MIT license

item.title: Version 0.0.4
item.description:
Version 0.0.4

  • Refactor: code quality cleanup
  • Refactor: replace SwiftUI App with pure AppKit entry point
  • Fixed: prevent phantom window flash on launch
  • Refactor: Settings with NavigationSplitView, close phantom window
  • Refactor: replace SwiftUI Settings scene with manual NSWindow
  • Fixed: observe Settings window appearance before activating
  • Fixed: Settings window focus on first open after launch
  • Fixed: use 50ms delay for first-launch window activation
  • Fixed: launch-at-login status and window focus activation
  • Fixed: hide future days in calendar heatmap, add unit tests
  • Fixed: allTimeDailyMap year collision, heatmap hover, consistent heights
  • Fixed: MonthHeatmap missing days, remove toolbar separator line
  • Fixed: show time range filter on Activity page, hide toolbar separator
  • Fixed: hide open-in-window toolbar button when no session is selected
  • Refactor: use process.terminationHandler instead of blocking waitUntilExit
  • Refactor: add @MainActor to AppState and AppDelegate
  • Fixed: guard date formatters with NSLock instead of nonisolated(unsafe)
  • Fixed: session window observer leak and stale remote cache cleanup
  • Fixed: replace silent catch blocks with os_log, remove force unwraps
  • Refactor: extract shared SessionMessageList to deduplicate session views
  • Refactor: extract shared SSHService to eliminate SSH code duplication

item.title: Version 0.0.3
item.description:
Version 0.0.3

  • New: show all messages with highlights during search, ScrollPosition API
  • New: Settings-style back/forward navigation, Cmd+F search in session views
  • New: open session detail in standalone window via toolbar button

item.title: Version 0.0.2
item.description:
Version 0.0.2

  • New: Sparkle auto-update, muted palette, NavigationSplitView alignment, code quality audit

item.title: Version 0.0.1
item.description:
Version 0.0.1

  • ci: add contents write permission for appcast push
  • ci: add build and release workflow with Sparkle appcast
  • Month heatmap: 4 rows × 8 columns grid, fill vertically with date labels
  • Month heatmap: fill width with flat cells and date labels per column
  • Use wider flat cells for Month heatmap, keep square cells for All Time
  • Unify Month heatmap with calendar grid layout, add cellSize parameter
  • Redesign Activity heatmaps: Today=24h hourly, Week=7d×4h grid, Month=31d compact grid
  • Add adaptive heatmap layout for short time ranges
  • Replace Activity hour×day heatmap with GitHub calendar heatmap
  • Fix calendar heatmap scrolling and chart x-axis label overlap
  • Fix session detail: tool_result display and remote session loading
  • Restructure Overview and Activity pages, fix navigation and heatmap filter
  • Replace source capsule chips with Menu-based device filter on Models and Tools pages
  • Add Project→Sessions and Session→Detail drill-down navigation
  • Add session detail view with conversation display
  • Add session detail model and JSONL parser service
  • Add all-time daily trend chart to Overview
  • Add time range filter to Activity page
  • Change heatmap to GitHub-style green color scheme
  • Replace shell grep with native Swift JSONL parser
  • Add session duration stats to activity page
  • Add tool usage statistics to dashboard
  • Add session browser to dashboard
  • Add activity heatmap to dashboard
  • Add app icon designed with Icon Composer
  • Add dashboard filters, multi-device support, adaptive popover, and UI improvements
  • Initial Commit
